channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Former financial intelligence chief proposes AI governance model inspired by anti-ISIS framework
item.description: A Harvard fellow and former financial intelligence chief argues that AI governance should be modeled on the global framework used to combat ISIS financing.

item.title: Loyal employees see bigger pay raises than job switchers, study finds
item.description: The benefits of job hopping may be slowing, but it can still pay off for younger workers.

item.title: Rising Treasury yields highlight risk of America's $39 trillion debt
item.description: America must refinance $10 trillion in debt over the next year, and rising Treasury yields could make that a catastrophe.

item.title: Gen Z rejects $200 dates, embraces 'solo-maxxing'—dating apps suffer
item.description: With date costs near $200, young people reframe single life as a deliberate, cheaper, less stressful lifestyle called 'solo maxxing.'
